signals: TSMC integra IA de NVIDIA en todo el proceso de fabricación para optimizar el rendimiento y diseño de semiconductores.
Lanzamiento de Nemotron 3 Ultra de 550B, un modelo MoE abierto optimizado para agentes y eficiencia en inferencia.
Google DeepMind acelera la ciencia con Co-Scientist, logrando avances reales en longevidad celular y tratamientos de ELA.
La fotónica con grafeno de Black Semiconductor emerge como alternativa para superar los límites de comunicación chip-a-chip.
Gemma 4 12B marca un hito en IA multimodal para ejecución local en portátiles con licencia Apache 2.0.
risks: Vulnerabilidad en la continuidad del servicio evidenciada por suspensiones de cuenta erróneas en OpenAI.
Cuellos de botella en la interconexión de chips que requieren saltos tecnológicos como la fotónica integrada.
Riesgos de validación científica en hipótesis generadas autónomamente por sistemas multiagente.
watch: Anuncios detallados del Google I/O 2026 y la evolución de Gemini Omni como modelo multimodal unificado.
Adopción de Nemotron 3 Ultra en entornos de producción frente a modelos propietarios de escala similar.
Próximo gran lanzamiento de OpenAI tras el críptico anuncio de disponibilidad.

items.title: TSMC Expands Use of NVIDIA AI Technologies Across Chip Production Operations
items.summary: TSMC, the world’s largest contract semiconductor manufacturer, is significantly expanding its deployment of NVIDIA artificial intelligence and accelerated computing technologies throughout its chip design and manufacturing operations. The initiative represents one of the most comprehensive applications of AI within&8230; Read More The post TSMC Expands Use of NVIDIA AI Technologies Across Chip Production Operations appeared first on SemiWiki .

items.title_es: TSMC amplía el uso de tecnologías de IA de NVIDIA en sus operaciones de producción de chips

items.title: Today we're shipping Nemotron 3 Ultra. A 550B MoE frontier-intelligence open model built for long-running agents. It delivers 5x faster inference and lowers ...
items.summary: Today we're shipping Nemotron 3 Ultra. A 550B MoE frontier-intelligence open model built for long-running agents. It delivers 5x faster inference and lowers the cost of complex agentic tasks by up to 30% versus other open frontier models.
items.raw_title: Today we're shipping Nemotron 3 Ultra. A 550B MoE frontier-intelligence open model built for long-running agents. It delivers 5x faster inference and lowers ...
items.raw_summary: Today we're shipping Nemotron 3 Ultra. A 550B MoE frontier-intelligence open model built for long-running agents. It delivers 5x faster inference and lowers the cost of complex agentic tasks by up to 30% versus other open frontier models.
items.why: Un modelo de 550B abierto y optimizado para agentes reduce drásticamente las barreras de entrada para tareas complejas de razonamiento.
items.title_es: NVIDIA lanza Nemotron 3 Ultra: un modelo MoE de 550B para inteligencia de frontera construido para agentes

items.title: We believe AI can be a dedicated research partner to help discover the next breakthrough. Enter Co-Scientist: our latest Gemini-based multi-agent system that...
items.summary: We believe AI can be a dedicated research partner to help discover the next breakthrough. Enter Co-Scientist: our latest Gemini-based multi-agent system that can generate, debate and evolve novel hypotheses for complex scientific problems 🧵 Meet Gemma 4 12B! A unified, encoder-free multimodal model designed to bring high-performance intelligence directly to your laptop, and released under an Apache 2.0 license. Bridging the gap between edge efficiency and advanced reasoning. Here is what’s new with Gemma 4 12B: 👇

items.title_es: Presentamos Co-Scientist y Gemma 4 12B: el sistema multiagente científico y el nuevo modelo multimodal para portátiles

items.title: CEO Interview with Daniel Schall of Black Semiconductor
items.summary: Dr. Daniel Schall is CEO and Co-Founder of Black Semiconductor. He holds a PhD in graphene optoelectronics from RWTH Aachen University. His work has shaped integrated photonics for over a decade, driving innovation in chip-to-chip communication. As co-founder of Black Semiconductor, his focus is on rethinking current solutions&8230; Read More The post CEO Interview with Daniel Schall of Black Semiconductor appeared first on SemiWiki .
